changes.commit: **Composite**: Fix "Largest Surface" type ignore the last surface.
**Composite**: Add option to round position when drawing.
**Normal**: Add option to force solid color output.
Add Clean Edge interpolation to blend nodes (blend, composite).
**Composite**: Fix error when trying to insert surface in-between.
**Graph Panel**: Fix adding node not auto connect.
